name: io.github.drzamarian/n8n-mcp-community
title: n8n MCP Community
description: A security-focused MCP server for self-hosted n8n Community Edition.

environmentVariables.name: N8N_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Absolute HTTPS base URL for the intended self-hosted n8n instance.

environmentVariables.name: N8N_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Dedicated least-privilege n8n Public API key.

environmentVariables.name: N8N_MCP_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Operation mode: read-only, write, or unsafe.

environmentVariables.name: N8N_ALLOW_INSECURE_HTTP
environmentVariables.description: Keep 0 unless plaintext HTTP to a non-loopback host is explicitly accepted.
